summary: Reactive collections pipeline library recommended for modern ReactiveUI apps with live, filtered, sorted, and keyed data.
recommendedPatterns: Prefer SourceCache<TObject, TKey> when items have a stable key.
Keep SourceCache/SourceList private and expose a ReadOnlyObservableCollection via Bind(out ...).
Place ObserveOn(MainThreadScheduler) close to Bind for UI collections.
avoidPatterns: Do not use ReactiveList for new work.
Do not expose SourceCache or SourceList publicly from feature services.
Do not default to ToCollection for ordinary UI binding.
setupSteps: Use Bind(out ...) and DisposeMany when appropriate.
commonPitfalls: Using SourceList where a keyed SourceCache fits better.
Placing ObserveOn too early and moving unnecessary work onto the UI thread.

sources.title: DynamicData repository
sources.notes: Reactive collections guidance for ReactiveUI apps.

harvest.sourceSummary: Curated from local ReactiveUI repositories, official GitHub documentation, and current SDK/package guidance.
harvest.notes: Prepared for the ReactiveUI MCP Server knowledge catalog.
